name: Walnut Stuffed Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2. Melt butter in a small saucepan and mix in bourbon, thyme, pepper, and salt.
3. Rub the pheasant birds inside and out with half of the seasoned butter mixture.
4. Mash half the grapes.
5. Mix mashed grapes, whole grapes, and walnuts with the remaining seasoned butter until well blended.
6. Place the mixture inside the birds and truss them closed.
7. Place the birds on a rack in an open roaster, breast side up.
8. Roast for 15 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees.
9. Continue roasting for 45 minutes, basting frequently with drippings.
